note:
Created 2 test files with comprehensive timezone edge case coverage:
- Backend C#: TimezoneEdgeCaseTests.cs (26 tests, all passing)
- Flutter Dart: timezone_edge_cases_test.dart (25 tests)
Covers: US DST spring-forward/fall-back, Australian AEDT/AEST transitions, Brazilian BRST/BRT transitions, multi-day events spanning DST, date boundary crossings during DST, local-time vs UTC interaction, extreme timezone offsets, JSON roundtrip preservation.
